mapper.select: SELECT id, spaceId, userId, title, content, recruitStatus, maxApplyCount,applyCount, createTime, editTime, updateTime, isDelete FROM space_recruit WHERE spaceId = #{spaceId} AND isDelete = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT sr.id, sr.spaceId, sr.userId, sr.title, sr.content, sr.recruitStatus, sr.maxApplyCount,sr.applyCount sr.createTime, sr.editTime, sr.updateTime, sr.isDelete, s.spaceName, s.spaceLevel, s.spaceType, u.userName AS publisherName, u.userAccount AS publisherAccount, SUM(CASE WHEN sra.applyStatus = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT sra.userId) AS totalApplyCount FROM space_recruit sr LEFT JOIN space s ON sr.spaceId = s.id LEFT JOIN user u ON sr.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN space_recruit_apply sra ON sr.id = sra.recruitId AND sra.isDelete = 0
sr.isDelete = 0
AND sr.spaceId IN
#{id}
GROUP BY sr.id

SELECT id, spaceId, userId, title, content, recruitStatus, maxApplyCount,applyCount, createTime, editTime, updateTime, isDelete FROM space_recruit WHERE userId = #{userId} AND isDelete = 0 ORDER BY createTime DESC
